en_title: George Lucas Has Upset Some Fans for Saying Rejecting AI Is Like Rejecting Cars in Favor of the Horse and Buggy, but Others Aren't Surprised by His Take at All
cn_title: 乔治·卢卡斯力挺AI：拒绝它就像拒绝汽车选马车
subtitle: 技术进步无法阻挡
opus_summary: 乔治·卢卡斯认为AI让电影制作更容易，拒绝它如同为马车拒绝汽车，技术进步不可逆。他的观点引发《星球大战》粉丝失望，也有人认为这符合他长期拥抱电影技术的作风。

paragraphs.en: As Hollywood and audiences wrestle with the impact of AI, one legend of cinema has said rejecting using the technology to make movies is like rejecting cars in favor of horses.
paragraphs.cn: 当好莱坞与观众努力应对AI带来的影响时，一位电影传奇人物表示，拒绝用这项技术制作电影，就像为了马匹而拒绝汽车。

paragraphs.en: George Lucas, who founded Lucasfilm, Industrial Light & Magic, and THX, and revolutionized special effects in Hollywood, has said that AI — warts and all — represents progress, and “there’s nothing you can do about it.”
paragraphs.cn: 创办卢卡斯影业、工业光魔和THX并革新好莱坞特效的乔治·卢卡斯表示，AI尽管并不完美，却代表着进步，而且「你对此无能为力」。

paragraphs.en: “Artificial intelligence means it’s much easier for us to make movies,” he told A Rabbit’s Foot . “It’s very much like sitting here saying, ‘Well, I believe the horse and the buggy is really where it’s at. These cars, they break down, they need gas, there’s all kinds of problems with them and pretty soon they’ll be making them into tanks, and then they’ll be killing people. It’s terrible.’ There’s nothing you can do about it.
paragraphs.cn: 他告诉A Rabbit’s Foot：「人工智能意味着我们制作电影容易得多。这就像坐在这里说，『我相信马匹和马车才是正道。汽车会抛锚、需要汽油，还有各种各样的问题，很快人们还会把它们造为坦克，然后用来杀人，太可怕了。』你对此无能为力。」

paragraphs.en: The 82-year-old Star Wars creator, who has retired from filmmaking, insisted that AI can be used to combat the dangers of AI itself, such as detecting when something is fake, and said those who use AI to “do something that’s illegal… should be punished.”
paragraphs.cn: 这位已经退出电影制作的82岁《星球大战》创作者坚称，可以用AI对抗AI本身的危险，例如检测内容是否伪造；他还表示，利用AI「从事违法行为……就应该受到惩罚」。

paragraphs.en: AI is the hottest topic in entertainment, with its impact across everything from movies to video games top of mind as storefronts are flooded by ‘AI slop’ and corporations incorporate it into their businesses in a bid to improve productivity. There’s even an entirely AI-generated The Odyssey film — deliberately timed to run up against the release of Christopher Nolan’s big budget The Odyssey — although it has been heavily criticized.
paragraphs.cn: AI是娱乐业最热门的话题。随着商店被「AI垃圾」淹没、企业为提高生产力而把它纳入业务，从电影到电子游戏的影响都备受关注。甚至还有一部完全由AI生成的《奥德赛》电影，刻意选择与克里斯托弗·诺兰大制作《奥德赛》同期上映，不过该片已遭到猛烈批评。

paragraphs.en: Indeed, Lucas’ comments here are in stark contrast to those of Nolan himself, who recently expressed delight in what he called the “rejection” of AI slop by younger audiences . 21-year-old Backrooms director Kane Parsons has called AI “genuinely harmful” to creativity, and a symptom of “cultural and economic rot.” “I think I’m in the same boat as most well-adjusted people,” Parsons told The Australian . “If I could snap my fingers and make generative AI disappear forever, I probably would. Creatively, I get no enjoyment from using those tools. It defeats the purpose entirely for me.
paragraphs.cn: 卢卡斯的言论与诺兰本人形成鲜明对比。诺兰最近对年轻观众「拒绝」AI垃圾感到欣慰。21岁的《后室》导演Kane Parsons称AI对创造力「确实有害」，也是「文化和经济腐烂」的症状。Parsons告诉《澳大利亚人报》：「我想自己和大多数心态正常的人站在同一边。如果打个响指就能让生成式AI永远消失，我大概会这么做。从创作角度，我使用这些工具得不到任何乐趣。对我而言，它完全违背了创作的意义。」

paragraphs.en: Lucas’ comments on AI were criticized by some who were quick to turn to Star Wars quotes to express their disappointment. “You were the chosen one!” is a common response, as are famous Darth Vader quotes about impending doom.
paragraphs.cn: 一些人批评卢卡斯对AI的言论，并迅速引用《星球大战》台词表达失望。「你曾是天选之子！」成为常见回应，达斯·维达关于厄运将至的名言也频繁出现。

paragraphs.en: Others, however, suggested Lucas’ thoughts on AI shouldn’t come as a surprise to anyone, given his history with incorporating technology into the filmmaking process. Indeed, Lucas has said much the same about AI in the past.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，也有人指出，考虑到卢卡斯一直将技术融入电影制作，他对AI的看法不该让任何人意外。事实上，卢卡斯过去谈到AI时也表达过大致相同的观点。

paragraphs.en: “I mean, this isn't at all surprising,” one person said . “Do you remember how crazy he was for CGI? He definitely would have made a movie with mostly AI if not entirely. This is actually a very very George Lucas take.”
paragraphs.cn: 一人表示：「我的意思是，这一点也不意外。还记得他当年有多痴迷CGI吗？如果不是完全用AI，他肯定也会制作一部大部分内容由AI完成的电影。这其实非常、非常乔治·卢卡斯。」

paragraphs.en: “George has a very mechanic mindset when it comes to film making,” . “AI is just another tool in the tool box to him and as a mechanic of course he's going to want to use the cool new tool. He's not like studio executives who dream of replacing people with it to increase profits.”
paragraphs.cn: 另一条评论称：「George在电影制作方面有一种很像机械师的思维。对他来说，AI只是工具箱里的另一件工具；作为机械师，他当然会想用这种很酷的新工具。他不像那些梦想用AI取代人类以提高利润的制片厂高管。」
